title: Talking about a typhoon warning
description: Classic Hong Kong small talk — typhoon signals are a shared city experience

turns.speaker: user
turns.chinese: 係呀，出咗好多汗。聽日話打風？
turns.jyutping: hai6 aa3 ceot1 zo2 hou2 do1 hon6 ting1 jat6 waa6 daa2 fung1
turns.romanization: Hai⁶ aa³, ceot¹ zo² hou² do¹ hon⁶. Ting¹ jat⁶ waa⁶ daa² fung¹?
turns.english: Yes, sweating so much. Is there a typhoon coming tomorrow?

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hai6 waa6 ho2 nang4 gwaa3 saam1 hou6
turns.romanization: Hai⁶, waa⁶ ho² nang⁴ gwaa³ saam¹ hou⁶.
turns.english: Yes, they say Signal 3 might be raised.

turns.speaker: user
turns.chinese: 係咩？咁要早啲返屋企喇。
turns.jyutping: hai6 me1 gam2 jiu3 zou2 di1 faan1 uk1 kei2 laa3
turns.romanization: Hai⁶ me¹? Gam², jiu³ zou² di¹ faan¹ uk¹ kei² laa³.
turns.english: Really? Then I should head home early.

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hai6 zeoi3 hou2 zou2 di1 zau2 siu2 sam1 aa3
turns.romanization: Hai⁶, zeoi³ hou² zou² di¹ zau². Siu² sam¹ aa³!
turns.english: Yes, best to leave early. Take care!
